description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to main branch and tags, and on pull requests to main. The workflow has write permissions to repository contents. It uses two ubuntu-24.04 jobs: build and release. The build job checks out code, sets up ccache, installs dependencies, sets up Python 3.12, installs Python dependencies, sets up Meson, builds and tests the project, generates documentation, and archives artifacts. The release job creates and populates a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag push.
